calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katharine West appeared by telephone for Jesse Davis and Steven Gerky.

Ms. West explained that without consulting with her, Jesse looked at that the tax benefit to the Estate in making distribution and that it was done in error. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
